entry.data:
PARTLY CLOUDY
MUCH COOLER WITH LOWS IN THE LOWER 30S
NORTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

SUNNY, COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 50S
WEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR AND BREEZY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH, INCREASING TO 15 TO 25 MPH AFTER MIDNIGHT

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 60S
WEST WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S
NORTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH, BECOMING NORTHEAST AFTER MIDNIGHT

PARTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE MID 60S
LOWS IN THE MID 50S

MOSTLY CLOUDY
SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
BREEZY WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

RAIN SHOWERS, SNOW SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING, THEN A CHANCE OF RAIN AND SNOW SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LIGHT SNOW ACCUMULATION POSSIBLE
BREEZY AND MUCH COOLER WITH LOWS IN THE MID 20S
CHANCE OF PRECIPITATION 70 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE MORNING, THEN CLEARING
BRISK AND MUCH COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE UPPER 30S

MOSTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 40S
LOWS IN THE LOWER 30S

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE MORNING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY SUNNY
NOT AS COOL WITH HIGHS IN THE UPPER 50S
